NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement (this "NDA") is entered into between Initiatives Pte. Ltd. (the "Company")
and Dr Sarah Chen (the "Consultant").

The Company shall disclose Confidential Information including pre-announcement details of the
proposed merger with Sigma Corp.

Sarah Chen will execute this agreement on behalf of the Consultant.
Contact: sarah.chen@initiatives.sg, NRIC S2345678E.
